query_text: Given a synthetic 512 px tile spanning 1.0 degree, compute the angular width per pixel.
result_summary: For this synthetic fixture only, 1.0 degree divided by 512 pixels equals about 0.001953 degrees per pixel, or 7.03125 arcseconds per pixel.
result_units: degrees per pixel; arcseconds per pixel
assumptions: The tile span and pixel count are synthetic fixture values.
No external computational service produced this response.
This arithmetic reference is not tied to any real sky survey, real tile, or restricted dataset.
privacy_boundary: This fixture contains no personal data, contributor data, credentials, remote request logs, or external service response payloads.
license_boundary: This fixture is authored synthetic content for the COSMOS-CQA research-only public repository and does not redistribute external provider content.
